result:
Done. **Round 24: RLE pattern file import/export** — 300 lines added.

- **`./life pattern.rle`** — load any standard RLE file from the command line. Pattern is centered on the grid, and the rule (B.../S...) from the header is automatically applied.
- **`Ctrl-E`** — export current live cells as a properly formatted RLE file (`export_001.rle`, etc.) with rule, dimensions, and generation metadata.

This is the bridge between the simulator and the thousands of patterns catalogued by the Life community — glider syntheses, oscillators, Turing machines, engineered spaceships — all now loadable directly into the census tracker, topology modes, and every other feature built over 23 rounds.
